title: cota dumetorum
intro: Cota dumetorum, also known as the Woodland Cota or Rough Cota, is a flowering plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cota dumetorum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
